# LEZAC original state-2 runtime frame oracle fixture.
# Captured 2026-04-21 from a temporary DOSBox run directory:
#   env TERM=xterm-256color xvfb-run -a dosbox-debug \
#     -c "mount c /tmp/lezac-dosbox-original-fixture-2" \
#     -c "c:" \
#     -c "DEBUG LEZAC.EXE"
# Runtime stopped at 01ED:7C89 after starting a one-player game, placing a bomb
# with N, and waiting for the player to enter the state-2 countdown path.
capture=state2_death_frame_table
source=dosbox-debug
temp_copy=1

runtime_cs=01ED
runtime_ds=0C8F

break ghidra=1000:3108 runtime=01ED:3108 label=state2_death_helper
break ghidra=1000:6053 runtime=01ED:6053 label=actor_update_candidate
break ghidra=1000:6148 runtime=01ED:6148 label=actor_frame_consumer
break ghidra=1000:7C89 runtime=01ED:7C89 label=state2_countdown_hit
break ghidra=1000:7DDF runtime=01ED:7DDF label=state2_return_active

dump DS:0060
0C8F:0060   22 27 02 09 0A 11 15 1C 1D 23 45 49 4A 4F 28 2A
0C8F:0070   32 34 36 38 29 2A 2B 2C 28 28 30 31 2B 2B 35 35

0C8F:00B0   5C 73 65 20 71 75 65 73 74 6F 20 67 69 6F 63 6F
0C8F:00C0   20 76 69 20 64 69 20 64 69 76 65 72 74 65 5C 65
0C8F:00D0   63 69 64 65 74 65 20 64 69 20 74 65 6E 65 72 6C

dump DS:C21E
0C8F:C21E   68 00 A8 00 10 10 00 00 10 27 70 17 10 10 00 00

0C8F:C440   7D 40 10 10 7D 41 10 10 7D 42 10 10 7D 43 10 10
